settings.block_des: Stock up and save with our extensive collection of bulk wax options, designed to meet the demands of busy professionals at any level. For all of our premium soft wax and hard wax options, we offer a wide range of sizes to suit every waxing style. Whether you’re running a high-volume salon or preparing for your busiest season, our bulk options ensure you always have the products you need at unbeatable value. Shop now and keep your waxing station fully stocked with Bombshell Wax!

Bombshell supports your professional hair removal services with hard and soft waxes that deliver reliable and consistent results for both you and your clients. Our professional wax beads for body hair removal are crafted with the finest ingredients and essential oils to eliminate skin irritation. Bombshell Wax is safe on a variety of skin types and perfect for anyone with sensitive skin. Bombshell Wax melts faster at lower temperatures, keeping the wax pliable and tacky, for quicker, less painful hair removal. Lower melting temperatures also lets the wax set quickly, allowing wax artists to work faster.

settings.block_content: A superior Beeswax blend, carefully sourced with ethical standards.
Adheres more to the hair and not the skin, leaving the skin feeling soft & supple and clients feeling confident & fresh.
